qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unbounded data accumulation in EventSource SSE client enables memory exhaustion DoS
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns unbounded SSE/EventSource buffering in ext/fetch/27_eventsource.js. The advisory concerns Deno node:crypto Cipheriv state not being finalized after cipher.final(), enabling repeated encryption; the vulnerable component, source path, root cause, and impact are different.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Missing HTTP header read timeout in Deno.serve() enables Slowloris-style denial-of-service
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns missing HTTP header and keep-alive timeout controls in Deno.serve()/hyper server setup. The advisory concerns node:crypto Cipheriv finalization state after cipher.final(); the code path, missing guard, sink, and security consequence do not overlap.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory is GHSA-5379-f5hf-w38v/CVE-2026-22863, where Deno's node:crypto Cipheriv is not finalized after cipher.final(), allowing repeated encryption and potential disclosure of secrets. The two qualifying findings instead cover EventSource/SSE memory growth and Deno.serve() HTTP connection timeout behavior.
evidence: Advisory summary: "Deno node:crypto doesn't finalize cipher"; PoC uses node:crypto createCipheriv and cipher.final().
eventsource_unbounded_data_dos reports ext/fetch/27_eventsource.js data/TextLineStream accumulation and OOM denial of service.
http_server_slowloris_dos reports ext/http/http_next.rs and ext/http/lib.rs missing HTTP timeout configuration for Deno.serve().
Search of final finding artifacts found no node:crypto, Cipheriv, cipher.final(), encryption finalization, or CWE-325 root-cause evidence in the qualifying reports.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No advisory-matched qualifying finding was present, so advisory-specific PoC execution was not applicable.
